text:
In the first scene, the sterile, modern corridors feel slightly alien—it is all sharp angles, sterile light, and echoing silence. I sense absence, anticipation, and an abstract readiness, as if the hidden stories of the building rest in waiting.

In the second, color and knowledge envelop me; bold text and displays draw my curiosity. The environment feels purposeful—here, human creativity and the technological future are on display, sparking wonder and the desire to know more. Contrasting the emptiness before, I now feel engaged and connected to a tapestry of ideas beyond myself.
